initiatives.name: Peace and Justice Action League of Spokane (PJALS)
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through nonviolent organizing, racial justice education, and movement building in Spokane. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through their BOLD program, Young Activist Leaders Program, and creating spaces for cross-racial, intergenerational organizing centered on the leadership of impacted people.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Survival Squad
initiatives.description: Mutual aid distributions and food shares for the people.

initiatives.name: Spectrum Center Spokane
initiatives.description: An intersectional and intergenerational organization that uplifts the 2SLGBTQIA+ Community.
